fields.name: Jumping Jacks
fields.description: Classic full-body cardio warm-up exercise.
fields.instructions:
1. Stand with feet together and arms at sides.
2. Jump and spread feet shoulder-width apart while raising arms overhead.
3. Jump back to starting position.
4. Maintain a steady rhythm throughout.
fields.tips: Keep core engaged. Land softly to protect knees.

fields.name: Push-Ups
fields.description: Foundational upper body strength exercise.
fields.instructions:
1. Start in high plank position, hands slightly wider than shoulders.
2. Lower chest to floor, keeping body straight.
3. Push back up to starting position.
4. Keep elbows at 45° angle to torso.
fields.tips: Don't let hips sag. Look slightly ahead of hands.

fields.name: Bodyweight Squats
fields.description: Primary lower body compound movement.
fields.instructions:
1. Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
2. Send hips back and down as if sitting in a chair.
3. Lower until thighs are parallel to floor.
4. Drive through heels to return to standing.
fields.tips: Keep chest up. Knees track over toes. Don't let them cave inward.

fields.name: Burpees
fields.description: High-intensity full body conditioning exercise.
fields.instructions:
1. Stand upright.
2. Drop into squat and place hands on floor.
3. Jump feet back into plank.
4. Perform a push-up.
5. Jump feet to hands.
6. Explode upward with arms overhead.
fields.tips: Modify by stepping instead of jumping if needed. Keep core braced.

fields.name: Plank Hold
fields.description: Core stability and endurance exercise.
fields.instructions:
1. Start in forearm plank position.
2. Elbows directly under shoulders.
3. Keep body in a straight line from head to heels.
4. Hold position, breathing steadily.
fields.tips: Don't hold your breath. Squeeze glutes and abs throughout.

fields.name: Mountain Climbers
fields.description: Dynamic core and cardio exercise.
fields.instructions:
1. Start in high plank position.
2. Drive right knee toward chest.
3. Quickly switch, driving left knee forward.
4. Alternate rapidly while keeping hips level.
fields.tips: Keep hips from rising. Move as fast as control allows.

fields.name: Lunges
fields.description: Unilateral leg strength and balance exercise.
fields.instructions:
1. Stand tall with feet together.
2. Step forward with right foot.
3. Lower back knee toward floor.
4. Front thigh should be parallel to floor.
5. Push off front foot to return.
6. Alternate legs.
fields.tips: Keep torso upright. Don't let front knee pass toes.

fields.name: High Knees
fields.description: Cardio drill that elevates heart rate quickly.
fields.instructions:
1. Stand with feet hip-width apart.
2. Run in place driving knees up to hip height.
3. Pump arms in opposition.
4. Land on balls of feet.
fields.tips: Stay on toes. Engage core throughout.

fields.name: Diamond Push-Ups
fields.description: Triceps-focused push-up variation.
fields.instructions:
1. Form a diamond shape with thumbs and index fingers.
2. Lower chest toward hands.
3. Keep elbows tracking close to body.
4. Press back up fully.
fields.tips: Go slow on the way down for maximum tricep activation.

fields.name: Glute Bridge
fields.description: Posterior chain activation and glute strengthening.
fields.instructions:
1. Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat.
2. Drive hips up by squeezing glutes.
3. Create straight line from shoulders to knees.
4. Hold briefly at top, then lower.
fields.tips: Don't hyperextend lower back. Squeeze glutes hard at top.

fields.name: Warrior I (Virabhadrasana I)
fields.description: Foundational standing yoga pose for strength and balance.
fields.instructions:
1. From Mountain Pose, step right foot back 3-4 feet.
2. Turn right foot out 45°.
3. Bend left knee over left ankle.
4. Raise arms overhead, palms facing or touching.
5. Hold and breathe deeply.
6. Repeat on other side.
fields.tips: Ground both feet firmly. Square hips to front as much as possible.

fields.name: Downward Facing Dog (Adho Mukha Svanasana)
fields.description: Classic yoga pose for full-body stretch and strength.
fields.instructions:
1. Start on hands and knees.
2. Tuck toes and lift hips toward ceiling.
3. Straighten arms and legs as much as comfortable.
4. Create an inverted V-shape with your body.
5. Press hands flat, lengthen spine.
6. Hold and breathe.
fields.tips: Bend knees if hamstrings are tight. Spread fingers wide.

fields.name: Tree Pose (Vrksasana)
fields.description: Balance pose that builds focus and stability.
fields.instructions:
1. Stand in Mountain Pose.
2. Shift weight to left foot.
3. Place right foot on inner left calf or thigh (not knee).
4. Bring palms together at chest or raise overhead.
5. Fix gaze on a still point.
6. Hold, then switch sides.
fields.tips: Use a wall for support if needed. Keep standing leg slightly soft.

fields.name: Child's Pose (Balasana)
fields.description: Restorative pose for back and hip relaxation.
fields.instructions:
1. Kneel on mat, big toes touching.
2. Sit back onto heels.
3. Fold forward, extending arms in front.
4. Rest forehead on mat.
5. Breathe into back body.
fields.tips: Place a cushion between thighs and calves if needed.

fields.name: Sun Salutation (Surya Namaskar)
fields.description: Dynamic sequence of 12 yoga poses for full-body activation.
fields.instructions:
1. Mountain Pose → Raised Arms → Forward Fold.
2. Half Lift → Plank → Chaturanga.
3. Upward Dog → Downward Dog.
4. Step forward → Half Lift → Forward Fold.
5. Raised Arms → Mountain Pose.
6. Complete one full round.
fields.tips: Move with breath. Inhale on expansions, exhale on folds.

fields.name: Hamstring Stretch
fields.description: Essential stretch for posterior leg flexibility.
fields.instructions:
1. Sit on floor with legs extended.
2. Reach forward toward feet.
3. Hold ankles, shins, or wherever comfortable.
4. Keep back as straight as possible.
5. Breathe and relax deeper on each exhale.
fields.tips: Never bounce into the stretch. Progress gradually.

fields.name: Hip Flexor Stretch
fields.description: Targets tight hip flexors from prolonged sitting.
fields.instructions:
1. Kneel on right knee, left foot forward.
2. Lunge forward until you feel stretch in right hip.
3. Keep torso tall.
4. Hold and breathe.
5. Switch sides.
fields.tips: Tuck pelvis slightly for deeper stretch. Don't arch lower back.

fields.name: Chest Opener Stretch
fields.description: Counteracts rounded posture from desk work.
fields.instructions:
1. Stand tall, clasp hands behind back.
2. Squeeze shoulder blades together.
3. Lift hands slightly away from body.
4. Open chest and look slightly up.
5. Hold and breathe.
fields.tips: Don't overextend neck. Keep shoulders down.

fields.name: Cat-Cow Stretch
fields.description: Spinal mobility and warm-up movement.
fields.instructions:
1. Start on hands and knees (tabletop position).
2. Inhale: drop belly, lift head and tailbone (Cow).
3. Exhale: round spine to ceiling, tuck chin and pelvis (Cat).
4. Flow smoothly between positions with breath.
fields.tips: Move from the spine, not the arms. Let breath lead movement.

fields.name: Hip 90/90 Stretch
fields.description: Comprehensive hip mobility exercise.
fields.instructions:
1. Sit on floor with front leg in 90° position.
2. Back leg also at 90° behind you.
3. Sit tall on sit bones.
4. Hold position, then lean over front shin.
5. Switch sides.
fields.tips: Use hands for support. Don't force range of motion.

fields.name: Thoracic Spine Rotation
fields.description: Improves upper back rotation and posture.
fields.instructions:
1. Lie on side, knees stacked at 90°.
2. Arms extended in front at chest height.
3. Rotate top arm up and over, opening chest to ceiling.
4. Let head follow gently.
5. Return and repeat.
6. Switch sides.
fields.tips: Keep hips stacked throughout. Move slowly with control.

fields.name: Ankle Circles
fields.description: Ankle joint mobility and injury prevention.
fields.instructions:
1. Sit or stand on one foot.
2. Lift other foot slightly off ground.
3. Slowly rotate ankle clockwise 10 times.
4. Reverse counterclockwise.
5. Switch feet.
fields.tips: Make circles as large as comfortably possible.

fields.name: Diaphragmatic Breathing
fields.description: Deep belly breathing for stress reduction and oxygen efficiency.
fields.instructions:
1. Lie on back or sit comfortably.
2. Place one hand on chest, one on belly.
3. Inhale through nose for 4 counts — belly rises.
4. Exhale through mouth for 6 counts — belly falls.
5. Chest should move minimally.
6. Continue rhythmically.
fields.tips: Practice 10 minutes daily for best results. Avoid shallow chest breathing.

fields.name: Box Breathing (4-4-4-4)
fields.description: Military-grade breathing technique for calm and focus.
fields.instructions:
1. Sit upright in comfortable position.
2. Inhale through nose for 4 counts.
3. Hold breath for 4 counts.
4. Exhale through mouth for 4 counts.
5. Hold empty for 4 counts.
6. Repeat the cycle.
fields.tips: Increase counts to 6 or 8 as you become more comfortable.

fields.name: 4-7-8 Breathing
fields.description: Relaxation technique for anxiety and sleep improvement.
fields.instructions:
1. Empty lungs completely.
2. Inhale through nose for 4 counts.
3. Hold for 7 counts.
4. Exhale forcefully through mouth for 8 counts.
5. This is one breath cycle.
6. Repeat 4 times.
fields.tips: Keep tongue behind upper front teeth throughout.
